theme_archetype.reasoning: High-end real estate requires an immersive, gallery-like experience. Dark themes with stark contrast allow property imagery and 3D architectural models to become the glowing centerpieces, evoking exclusivity.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.caption: text-sm font-light text-secondary

rules.anti_default: Absolutely NO Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Headings must utilize the elegant weights of Cormorant Garamond.
rules.alignment: Left-align dense property specs. Center-align only high-impact hero text or standalone quotes.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more padding than standard SaaS. Allow imagery and 3D space to breathe.

grid_system.usage: Use asymmetrical bento layouts for property features and image galleries.

hero.layout: min-h-[90vh] relative flex flex-col justify-end pb-24 px-8 md:px-16
hero.3d_strategy: React Three Fiber canvas as absolute background `z-0`. Use an abstract architectural model or slowly rotating dark geometric shapes (or a premium 3D home model if available).
hero.overlay: MANDATORY gradient overlay: `bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0C] via-[#0A0A0C]/60 to-transparent` covering the bottom 60% of the screen to ensure heading readability.
hero.content: Placed at the bottom left `z-10`, massive H1, an elegant overline, and an accent-colored outline button.

header_nav.classes: fixed top-0 left-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0C]/40 border-b border-white/5
header_nav.text: Uppercase, highly tracked nav links. Primary CTA button should be a subtle glassy outline, not a solid block.

property_cards.classes: group relative overflow-hidden bg-transparent border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-500
property_cards.image_treatment: Image takes top 60% of card. Image must have `transition-transform duration-[1.5s] ease-out group-hover:scale-105`.
property_cards.data_display: Price in Cormorant Garamond. Specs (Beds, Baths, Sqft) in tiny uppercase Outfit with thin vertical dividers.

property_detail_page.360_viewer: Main showcase section using a library like `react-photo-sphere-viewer` or custom R3F scene. Needs a 'Drag to explore' UI hint.
property_detail_page.specs_panel: Sticky right sidebar on desktop, utilizing a 1px grid border system (`border-collapse` look) to display raw data (Price, Year Built, Lot Size) cleanly.
property_detail_page.gallery: Masonry or bento-style asymmetrical image grid.

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#C19A6B] text-[#C19A6B] hover:bg-[#C19A6B] hover:text-[#0A0A0C] transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 transition-all rounded-none px-6 py-3

animations_and_motion.scrolling: MUST use `lenis` for premium momentum scrolling. This is critical for the luxury feel.
animations_and_motion.page_transitions: Framer Motion: fade in and slow upward translation (`y: 20` to `y: 0`, `duration: 0.8`, `ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]`).
animations_and_motion.3d_interaction: Tie 3D camera rotation slightly to mouse movement (`onPointerMove`) to give depth before clicking.
animations_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons use slow color fills. Images use extremely slow 1.5s scale transforms to feel cinematic, not snappy.

properties_exteriors.description: Luxury resort pool area at night

interiors.description: Elegant modern living room with stairs
Spacious luxury living room with natural light

abstract_hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract geometric pattern of dark blue cubes, use if 3D scene fails to load or as a fallback texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: You must install @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, and three for the hero 3D experience.
INSTALLATION: Install framer-motion for UI animations.
INSTALLATION: Install react-photo-sphere-viewer for the 360 property tours (or implement a custom sphere in R3F).
DO NOT USE INTER, ROBOTO, OR SPACE GROTESK. Import Cormorant Garamond and Outfit from Google Fonts.
DO NOT USE PURPLE, TEAL, OR BRIGHT BLUE. Stick exclusively to the Obsidian Black and Warm Gold/Bronze palette provided.
BORDERS: All containers and cards must have crisp, sharp edges (`rounded-none` or at most `rounded-sm`). Real estate architecture favors sharp geometric precision over bubbly soft corners.
MOCK DATA: Create robust mock JSON data in the frontend for at least 6 properties to populate the grid and power the filtering system.
TESTING: Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="filter-price-button"`, `data-testid="property-card-1"`).
HERO OVERLAY: Do not skip the gradient overlay on the hero section. Text contrast against 3D scenes is critical.
